metadata.description: Not used, but needed to pass arm-ttk test `Location-Should-Not-Be-Hardcoded`.  We instead use the `workspace-location` which is derived from the LA workspace
[concat('Region to deploy solution resources -- separate from location selection',parameters('location'))]
Workspace name for Log Analytics where Microsoft Sentinel is setup
resource group name where Microsoft Sentinel is setup
subscription id where Microsoft Sentinel is setup

connectorUiConfig.title: Strider Shield
connectorUiConfig.descriptionMarkdown: The [Strider Shield](https://www.striderintel.com/shield/) Data Connector delivers curated intelligence on state-sponsored actors by ingesting Strider Shield data into Microsoft Sentinel.

sampleQueries.description: Get Sample of Strider Shield events

dataTypes.name: StriderShieldEmailAddresses_CL
dataTypes.lastDataReceivedQuery:
StriderShieldEmailAddresses_CL
 | where TimeGenerated > ago(7d) | summarize Time = max(TimeGenerated)
 | where isnotempty(Time)

dataTypes.name: StriderShieldEmailDomains_CL
dataTypes.lastDataReceivedQuery:
StriderShieldEmailDomains_CL
 | where TimeGenerated > ago(7d) | summarize Time = max(TimeGenerated)
 | where isnotempty(Time)

dataTypes.name: StriderShieldRiskSignals_CL
dataTypes.lastDataReceivedQuery:
StriderShieldRiskSignals_CL
 | where TimeGenerated > ago(7d) | summarize Time = max(TimeGenerated)
 | where isnotempty(Time)

dataTypes.name: StriderShieldRiskSignalsDefinitions_CL
dataTypes.lastDataReceivedQuery:
StriderShieldRiskSignalsDefinitions_CL
 | where TimeGenerated > ago(7d) | summarize Time = max(TimeGenerated)
 | where isnotempty(Time)

dataTypes.name: StriderShieldTerms_CL
dataTypes.lastDataReceivedQuery:
StriderShieldTerms_CL
 | where TimeGenerated > ago(7d) | summarize Time = max(TimeGenerated)
 | where isnotempty(Time)

resourceProvider.permissionsDisplayText: Read and Write permissions are required.

customs.name: Strider Shield API token
customs.description: A Strider Shield API Token is required. See the Strider Shield documentation on how to create an API token.

instructionSteps.title: STEP 1 - Use an Authentication Strider Shield API endpoint
instructionSteps.description: Follow the Strider Shield documentation for guidance on this step.

instructionSteps.title: STEP 2 - Choose the correct base URL
instructionSteps.description: There are multiple Strider Shield servers which might host your events. The correct server depends on your license and region.Input the base URL as displayed by the documentation (including 'https://' and without a trailing '/').

instructionSteps.title: STEP 3 - Enter your Strider Shield Details
instructionSteps.description: Enter the Strider Shield Authentication API endpoint, Base URL, Client ID & Client Secret below:

dataFlows.transformKql: source | where isnotempty(itemType) and itemType == "emailAddress" | extend TimeGenerated = now()
source | where isnotempty(itemType) and itemType == "emailDomain" | extend TimeGenerated = now()
source | where isnotempty(riskSignalsCount) | extend TimeGenerated = now()
source | where isnotempty(risk_category_abbr) | extend TimeGenerated = now()
source | where isnotempty(itemType) and itemType == "term" | extend TimeGenerated = now()

properties.descriptionHtml:
Note: Please refer to the following before installing the solution:

• Review the solution Release Notes

• There may be known issues pertaining to this Solution, please refer to them before installing.

The Strider Shield Data Connector delivers curated intelligence on state-sponsored actors by ingesting Strider Shield data into Microsoft Sentinel.

Data Connectors: 1

Learn more about Microsoft Sentinel | Learn more about Solutions
